reviews.comment:
Mala atención del servicio a socios para auxilio en el lugar, por ser domingo. No tenían lámpara para luz reglamentaria de un Bora. El desinterés llegó al servicio de asistencia telefónica que ofrecieron el cambio de lámpara siempre y cuando cuente con el repuesto, ofrecen servicio condicional. Alta cuota bajo resultado.

(Translated by Google)
Poor customer service for on-site assistance, especially since it was a Sunday. They didn't have a bulb for the standard headlight on a Bora. The lack of interest extended to the telephone support service, which only offered to replace the bulb if they had the part available, and their service was conditional. High fees, low results.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/4834150439448216609/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNvcXR1dUlnEAE
